Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Jemalloc Un-Abandoned by Meta 17 upvotes, 0 comments
  2. Human Organ Atlas 33 upvotes, 2 comments
  3. Bringing Semiconductors to Kazakhstan 40 upvotes, 5 comments
  4. The “small web” is bigger than you might think 73 upvotes, 13 comments
  5. The return-to-the-office trend backfires 12 upvotes, 0 comments
  6. Canada's bill C-22 mandates mass metadata surveillance 959 upvotes, 303 comments
  7. My Journey to a reliable and enjoyable locally hosted voice assistant 188 upvotes, 60 comments
  8. MoD sources warn Palantir role at heart of government is threat to UK security 450 upvotes, 165 comments
  9. I Love FreeBSD 209 upvotes, 74 comments
  10. Lazycut: A simple terminal video trimmer using FFmpeg 84 upvotes, 29 comments
  11. Corruption erodes social trust more in democracies than in autocracies 552 upvotes, 263 comments
  12. Comparing Python Type Checkers: Typing Spec Conformance 63 upvotes, 22 comments
  13. Home Assistant waters my plants 195 upvotes, 87 comments
  14. Event Publisher enables event integration between Keycloak and OpenFGA 18 upvotes, 4 comments
  15. Polymarket gamblers threaten to kill me over Iran missile story 899 upvotes, 557 comments
  16. 'Pokémon Go' players unknowingly trained delivery robots with 30B images 127 upvotes, 71 comments
  17. Speed at the cost of quality: Study of use of Cursor AI in open source projects 34 upvotes, 14 comments
  18. On The Need For Understanding 15 upvotes, 4 comments
  19. Launch HN: Voygr (YC W26) – A better maps API for agents and AI apps 32 upvotes, 14 comments
  20. Even Faster Asin() Was Staring Right at Me 70 upvotes, 39 comments
  21. How I write software with LLMs 434 upvotes, 414 comments
  22. US Job Market Visualizer 235 upvotes, 215 comments
  23. Launch HN: Chamber (YC W26) – An AI Teammate for GPU Infrastructure 7 upvotes, 2 comments
  24. Language Model Teams as Distrbuted Systems 5 upvotes, 1 comments
  25. MM120, a pharmaceutical form of LSD, shown to reduce anxiety symptoms (2025) 59 upvotes, 54 comments
  26. Apideck CLI – An AI-agent interface with much lower context consumption than MCP 69 upvotes, 74 comments
  27. Cert Authorities Check for DNSSEC from Today 43 upvotes, 45 comments
  28. AirPods Max 2 75 upvotes, 128 comments
  29. The bureaucracy blocking the chance at a cure 28 upvotes, 50 comments
  30. Kaizen (YC P25) Hiring Eng, GTM, Cos to Automate BPOs 0 upvotes, 0 comments
